creator: vsjcfm@gmail.com
text:
Links to build logs are below:
security/cyrus-sasl2: http://pastebin.com/99p00USS
deskutils/kdepimlibs4: http://pastebin.com/Hc4TJvuw

security/cyrus-sasl2 options below:
===> The following configuration options are available for cyrus-sasl-2.1.26_1:                                                                                                                     
     BDB=off: Berkeley Database                                                                                                                                                                     
     MYSQL=off: MySQL database                                                                                                                                                                      
     PGSQL=off: PostgreSQL database                                                                                                                                                                 
     SQLITE=off: Enable SQLite2 backend                                                                                                                                                             
     SQLITE3=off: Enable SQLite3 backend                                                                                                                                                            
     ALWAYSTRUE=off: Enable the alwaystrue password verifier                                                                                                                                        
     AUTHDAEMOND=off: Enable use of authdaemon                                                                                                                                                      
     DEV_URANDOM=off: Use /dev/urandom                                                                                                                                                              
     KEEP_DB_OPEN=off: Keep handle to Berkeley DB open                                                                                                                                              
     OBSOLETE_CRAM_ATTR=off: Enable cmusaslsecretCRAM-MD5 property                                                                                                                                  
     CRAM=off: Enable CRAM-MD5 authentication                                                                                                                                                       
     DIGEST=off: Enable DIGEST-MD5 authentication                                                                                                                                                   
     LOGIN=on: Enable LOGIN authentication                                                                                                                                                          
     NTLM=off: Enable NTLM authentication                                                                                                                                                           
     OTP=off: Enable OTP authentication                                                                                                                                                             
     PLAIN=on: Enable PLAIN authentication                                                                                                                                                          
     SCRAM=off: Enable SCRAM authentication                                                                                                                                                         
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings

How-To-Repeat: Update security/cyrus-sasl2 to 2.1.26_1 & try to build deskutils/kdepimlibs4
